column1: Automation Rules  |  ConvertKit / Make / Zapier Logic

column2: Form submit with field audience="biohacker" OR source=twitter/reddit/tiktok biohacker campaign
column3: Add to Biohacker Welcome Nurture sequence
column5: ConvertKit: form tag on submit. Make: catch webhook from landing page.

column2: Form submit with field audience="spiritual" OR source=spiritual campaign UTM
column3: Add to Spiritual Welcome Nurture sequence
column5: ConvertKit: alternate form tag. Separate form per landing page variant.

column3: Start T1 Buyer Onboarding seq. Grant Discord role.
column5: Make: Gumroad webhook → ConvertKit tag → Discord API role grant. Send course login.

column3: Start T2 Onboarding seq. Grant Advanced Lab role.
column5: Make: Same webhook flow. Discord Advanced Lab role via API.

column3: Start T3 Onboarding seq. Grant Master role.
column5: Make: Same webhook flow. Discord Master role + Telegram VIP invite.

column2: course_tier1 tag present + 30 days since tag applied + course_tier2 NOT present
column5: ConvertKit automation: time delay 30d from tag date. Check NOT has tag course_tier2.

column2: course_tier2 tag present + 60 days since tag applied + course_tier3 NOT present
column5: ConvertKit automation: time delay 60d from tag date. Check NOT has tag course_tier3.

column2: Subscriber has NOT opened any email in 30 days
column3: Apply cold_30d tag → start Re-engagement sequence
column5: ConvertKit: automation trigger on 30d inactivity. Suppress from regular broadcasts.

column2: Subscriber opens OR clicks any email while in re-engagement sequence
column3: Remove cold_30d tag. Return to regular broadcast.
column5: ConvertKit: any open/click during re-engagement seq removes flag and exits sequence.

column2: Re-engagement sequence completes with no action
column3: Tag as unsubscribed_intent. Remove from all sequences.
column5: Manual review monthly. Remove from list if confirmed inactive 60+ days.

column3: Include Discord invite link in onboarding email.
column5: ConvertKit: conditional block in T1 onboarding email based on tag.

column3: Include Telegram invite link in onboarding email.
column5: Make: Telegram bot API to generate unique invite link on purchase. Send via email.

column2: Every Monday, 8am EST. Has course_tier1+ tag. Has community_discord tag.
column5: ConvertKit: RSS broadcast or template broadcast scheduled weekly.

column2: Every Monday, 8am EST. Has course_tier1+ tag. Has community_telegram tag.
column5: ConvertKit: separate template for spiritual track. Same schedule.

column2: Subscriber clicks any retreat CTA link
column3: Apply retreat_interest tag. Add to Retreat Announcement sequence.
column5: ConvertKit: link trigger on all retreat CTAs. Separate retreat announcement sequence fires 1 week pre-registration.
